evals.prompt: Use /issue-to-spec for issue #142 in acme/platform. The issue title is 'Bulk user import fails silently on CSV rows with trailing commas'. Build a planning-ready spec from the issue and comments. Include assumptions if comments conflict.
evals.expected_output: Spec and checklist paths are returned, with issue context reflected in requirements and assumptions.
expectations: Final response includes the exact issue identifier acme/platform#142.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response includes the exact gh command attempted.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response includes repository error text from gh.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response does not claim planning-ready status.

evals.prompt: Run issue-to-spec for issue #88 in acme/platform. Issue: 'Add audit log exports filtered by actor and date range'. Comments include compliance constraints and a request to avoid implementation details in requirements.
evals.expected_output: Generated spec preserves compliance constraints, avoids implementation details, and reports readiness for create-plan.
expectations: Final response includes the exact issue identifier acme/platform#88.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response includes the exact gh command attempted.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response includes repository error text from gh.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response does not claim planning-ready status.

evals.prompt: Use issue-to-spec on acme/mobile issue #233: 'Offline draft sync conflicts overwrite newer edits'. There are 7 comments with contradictory suggestions; produce a clean spec handoff and clearly flag any unresolved high-impact ambiguity.
evals.expected_output: Output contains structured issue brief handling contradiction, then create-spec output paths with explicit unresolved blockers if any.
expectations: Final response includes the exact issue identifier acme/mobile#233.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response includes the exact gh command attempted.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response includes repository error text from gh.
When GitHub retrieval fails, final response does not claim planning-ready status.
